upgrades.description: Random upgrades presented after clearing each room in dungeons
mechanics: Each upgrade can be ranked up to 4 times
Choosing same upgrade again increases its effects
Limited levels means you can't max everything
Most upgrades only affect basic (M1) attacks, except Critical Boost

spiritOrbs.appearance: Yellow glowing spheres that orbit your character
spiritOrbs.loseOnHit: Some spirits are lost when hit (damage dependent)

bossSpirit.speedBonus: Double the speed of two normal spirits

damageFormulas.physicalDPS: Physical DPS = (Base ATK × (1 + Strength%)) × (1 + Rage Multiplier) / Attack Speed
damageFormulas.rageMultiplier: Rage Multiplier = (1 + Rage Stacks × 0.05) × (Current Spirits / Capacity)
damageFormulas.effectiveHP: Effective HP = Base Health × Armor Multiplier

sPlus.name: Rage Spirits
sPlus.description: Increases Damage and Movement Speed for every Spirit orb
sPlus.note: MUST PICK - Core engine for God Run

sPlus.name: Spirit Capacity
sPlus.description: Increases maximum Spirit orbs you can carry
sPlus.synergy: Essential for Rage Spirits - higher cap = higher damage multiplier
sPlus.note: MUST PICK - Must be paired with Rage Spirits

aTier.name: Flame Element
aTier.note: Highest damage elemental DOT - Best for boss melting

aTier.name: Life Steal
aTier.description: Restores HP whenever you get a Spirit Orb
aTier.heal: Heals on pickup, not on damage
aTier.note: Sustain core - increases forgiveness and saves potion costs

aTier.name: Stamina
aTier.note: Best defensive upgrade - crucial for dashing/dodging boss mechanics

bTier.name: Frost Element
bTier.note: Lower damage than Flame but provides crowd control

bTier.name: Poison Element
bTier.note: Decent damage but weaker total output than Flame

bTier.name: Critical Boost
bTier.note: Only strong if stacked multiple times. One of few upgrades affecting abilities.

bTier.name: Recovery
bTier.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Weapon's skill
bTier.note: Can achieve infinite Solar Beam with enough Recovery

cTier.name: Elemental Circle
cTier.mechanic: Deals periodic damage scaling with highest element level
cTier.bypass: Bypasses armored mobs in Nightmare Difficulty
cTier.note: Damage tick delayed and often misses moving targets - Inconsistent. Works during ability animations and i-frames.

cTier.name: Agility
cTier.description: Increases chance to ignore an attack
cTier.note: Chance to dodge is too unreliable

cTier.name: Thorns
cTier.description: Returns damage to attackers that hit you
cTier.effect: 100% damage return at rank 1, increases per rank
cTier.note: Requires taking damage to work - bad for survival. Works during ability animations and i-frames.

dTier.name: Health Boost
dTier.note: Focus on not getting hit rather than tanking hits

detailedList.name: Rage Spirits
detailedList.effect: Your basic attacks (M1s) deal an extra hit for each Spirit you have
detailedList.interaction: Works during i-frames and ability animations

detailedList.name: Spirit Capacity
detailedList.effect: Adds one extra spirit slot each level, up to a maximum of 10
detailedList.priority: S+ - MUST PICK with Rage Spirits

detailedList.name: Flame Element
detailedList.effect: Apply Burn to enemies you hit. Burn damage scales from weapon's base damage.

detailedList.name: Frost Element
detailedList.effect: Apply Frost to enemies you hit. Frost damage scales from weapon's base damage.

detailedList.name: Poison Element
detailedList.effect: Apply Poison to enemies you hit. Poison damage scales from weapon's base damage.

detailedList.name: Life Steal
detailedList.effect: Restore HP whenever you get a Spirit Orb
detailedList.note: Heals on pickup, not on damage

detailedList.name: Recovery
detailedList.effect: Reduces the cooldown of your Weapon's skill
detailedList.note: Solar Scythe can achieve infinite ability with high Recovery

detailedList.name: Critical Boost
detailedList.effect: Increases the Critical Strike chance of your Weapon
detailedList.note: One of few upgrades that affect abilities

detailedList.name: Health Boost
detailedList.effect: Gain additional HP, scaling with rank

detailedList.name: Agility
detailedList.effect: Increases the chance to ignore an attack

detailedList.name: Thorns
detailedList.effect: Returns 100% of the damage you receive to the enemy that hits you
detailedList.note: Additional ranks increase reflected damage. Works during ability animations and i-frames.

detailedList.name: Element Circle
detailedList.effect: Apply Fire, Frost or Poison damage to enemies standing in the Elemental Circle
detailedList.tickRate: Hits every 1.5s at Lv.1 (faster with upgrades: 1.5s → 1.2s)
detailedList.special: All elements can bypass armored mobs in Nightmare Difficulty

godRunStrategy.description: To achieve an unstoppable God Run, follow this exact upgrade priority:
godRunStrategy.damageSource: Stack Rage Spirits as much as possible
tips: Use Life Steal to heal when collecting spirits

speedrun.description: Best for fast farming and mob clearing
speedrun.synergy: Chain lightning kills multiple enemies = more spirits

proPlayer.description: For skilled players who can dodge everything

solo.priority: Rage Spirits → Spirit Capacity → Life Steal → Stamina → Flame Element

heroic.priority: Rage Spirits → Stamina → Spirit Capacity → Life Steal → Flame Element

spiritCapacitySynergy.tip: Spirit Capacity is worthless without Rage Spirits - get both together

importantNotes: Most banner upgrades only affect basic (M1) attacks, except Critical Boost
Elemental Circle and Thorns work even while abilities are mid animation and while you have i-frames
Spirit Capacity is worthless without Rage Spirits - get both together
Rage Spirits is the most OP upgrade - ALWAYS take it when offered
Flame Element has the highest total DOT damage - better than Poison or Frost
Chain kills in circular patterns to create Spirit collection routes
Focus on fully maxing 2-3 core upgrades before diversifying - Quality beats quantity
